subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! In this moment I am companioned by thy remembrance and mention, and I beseech from Him renewed confirmations with every breath [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حق در ایندم بیاد و ذکر تو همدمم و از حق میطلبم که دمبدم توفیق جدیدی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
